description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with JavaScript Promises, testing practical knowledge of asynchronous patterns, error handling, and promise chaining. It is moderately challenging, offering hints and encouraging hands‑on experimentation in the browser console. The tone is supportive and interactive, inviting learners to share results and engage with the creator.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, asynchronous programming, promise chaining, error handling, browser console debugging
Audience: Web developers and JavaScript learners who have basic to intermediate experience and want to deepen their understanding of async code.
